author: codex

patch.value: Implements itemUrlBase option across src/types.ts, src/generator.ts, and src/cli.ts. Adds test coverage (test 5) and updates docs/usage.md.
Add --item-url-base option to make pm item IDs clickable links

When --item-url-base is supplied, each pm item ID in the changelog is rendered as a markdown hyperlink pointing to the item's .toon file. The type subdirectory (issues/, tasks/, chores/, features/, epics/) is resolved automatically from the item type field, so all item types are correctly linked without any per-type configuration.

- --item-url-base <url> CLI flag accepted. - Item IDs rendered as [pmc-abc](url/issues/pmc-abc.toon) (type dir derived from item type). - Works for all pm item types (Issue, Task, Chore, Feature, Epic). - 19 tests pass. - changelog:check passes after regeneration.

value.author: codex
value.text: No pm-cli or SDK changes required. This is a pure pm-changelog feature: the generator derives the type directory from item.type using a simple lowercase+plural rule.

value.author: codex
value.text: Requested to satisfy requirement: generated changelog must link to pm items with GitHub web-compatible links so users can click through to .toon file details.

value.author: codex
value.text: pm stores items in type-specific subdirectories: .agents/pm/{issues,tasks,chores,features,epics}/. Always derive the subdir from item.type when constructing item URLs; never hardcode a single type directory.

value.path: test/generator.test.ts,project,Test 5: createChangelog makes item IDs clickable links when itemUrlBase is set

message: Users can now pass --item-url-base to the CLI (or itemUrlBase to the TypeScript API) so every pm item ID in the generated changelog becomes a clickable hyperlink to its .toon file in the repository.

patch.value: Implemented itemUrlBase in types.ts, generator.ts, cli.ts. Added itemTypeToDir() to derive type subdirectory from item.type. Test 5 added and passing. docs/usage.md updated.
Item IDs in changelog are clickable links to correct type subdirectory .toon files on GitHub. 19 tests pass.
19/19 tests pass including new itemUrlBase test covering Issue, Chore, Task types. changelog:check passes after regeneration.
itemUrlBase implemented; all item types correctly linked; 19/19 tests pass; docs updated.
